pundit.name: Eric Wynalda
pundit.take: **Mustard Boy's Brazil to steamroll Ghost Pepper's Haiti in a mismatch worthy of a youth scrimmage.** Look, anyone who's ever watched more than a half of international soccer knows Brazil's a powerhouse, and Zach — yes, "Mustard Boy" — struck gold in picking them. Devin, or should I say "Ghost Pepper," is either ignorant or clueless, expecting Haiti to put up a fight. And believe me, this matchup will be uglier than a Sunday league game I once played when the referee forgot his whistle. Brazil will torch Haiti faster than I could blow past a defender, and if Devin's struck any luck with this selection, it's purely accidental. This will be an easy 3 points for Mustard Boy, reinforcing his position at the top. Meanwhile, Gunner, who proudly wears his "Bubba G" badge of shame, sits in dead last with a paltry six points. Someone needs to tell Bubba that picking teams isn't about recognizing names from FIFA 23. Wake up, amateur hour is over; you guys are embarrassing yourselves out here.

pundit_takes.headline: Zach Celebrates Switzerland Win, Ignores Czechia's Sympathetic Draw with South Africa
pundit_takes.subtitle: Mustard Boy calls an impromptu fondue party after scraping one point.

pundit_takes.headline: Devin's USA Set to Outshine Australia, Hopes for More Than One Point
pundit_takes.subtitle: Ghost Pepper aims for a win to balance Bosnian heartbreak.

pundit_takes.headline: Gunner Bets on Morocco to Overwhelm Scotland and Escape Last Place
pundit_takes.subtitle: Bubba G's underdog pick needs a win to climb the standings.

pundit_takes.headline: Rafe's Draft Choices Continue to Surprise as Germany Awaits First Match
pundit_takes.subtitle: The Noisemaker's qualifications questioned as his Tier 1 team remains idle.

rome_analytics_quotes: Gunner, supposed favorite, is stuck at rock bottom. Time to hand over your prediction badge.
Rafe's draft strategy: the ultimate crash course in 'What Not to Do.'
Gayden 1, Rafe 0: A father schooling his son in the league of hard knocks.
Sim gave Gunner top odds, but he's sinking fast. Computers taking a holiday break?
